series_metadata.series_description: This file contains records generally associated with ten day notices issued to the Division of Mineral Resources Management (Division) by the United States Department of Interior, Office Surface Mining Reclamation Enforcement (OSMRE), and includes, but is not limited to: requests for extension of time, responses by the Division to the notices, supporting documentation to the notices or responses, and final determinations of OSMRE to the notices and responses.

retention_rules.disposition: Paper: Paper records to be retained until five years after final determination by OSM and then destroyed. If scanned and saved in an electronic format, the paper copy may be destroyed at that time. ; Electronic: Except for final determination by OSM, which will be maintained permanently, electronic records will be retained until five years after the final determination by OSM, then destroyed., Paper: Shred ; Electronic: Delete
